description: Auto-Sync After API Key Setup - Automatically sync WaniKani data after successful API key validation for seamless onboarding

userStories.title: Show sync progress UI after API key validation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see sync progress after saving my API key so that I know the app is downloading my data.
acceptanceCriteria: After successful API key validation, show a syncing state instead of Alert
Display a spinner and 'Syncing your WaniKani data...' message
User cannot dismiss the sync UI while sync is in progress
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
userStories.notes: Implemented isSyncing state in SettingsScreen. After successful API key validation and save, transitions to syncing UI instead of Alert. Shows spinner with 'Syncing your WaniKani data...' message. User cannot dismiss as there are no dismiss buttons during sync. All 886 tests pass.

userStories.title: Sync subjects and assignments after API key save
userStories.description: As a user, I want my WaniKani data to be downloaded automatically after saving my API key so that I can start using the app immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: After API key is saved, fetch user level via getUserLevel()
Call syncSubjects() with user's level
Call syncAssignments() in parallel with subjects sync
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
userStories.notes: After successful API key save, creates WaniKaniClient with the saved key, fetches user level via getUserLevel(), then calls syncSubjects() and syncAssignments() in parallel using Promise.all(). Added 6 tests verifying: getUserLevel is called, syncSubjects receives correct maxLevel, syncAssignments is called, parallel execution, and no sync calls on validation/save failures. All 892 tests pass.

userStories.title: Navigate to Home after successful sync
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be taken to the Home screen after my data syncs so that I can immediately see my available lessons and reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: After sync completes successfully, automatically navigate to Home screen
Home screen shows updated lesson/review counts (not 0/0)
'Last synced' indicator shows the current sync time
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
userStories.notes: Added useNavigation hook to SettingsScreen. After successful sync, uses navigation.reset() to navigate to Home screen and replace the navigation stack (preventing back navigation to Settings). Home screen uses useFocusEffect to load dashboard data from the database, which includes updated lesson/review counts and lastSyncedAt time. Added test to verify navigation occurs after sync. All 893 tests pass.

userStories.title: Handle sync errors with retry option
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a clear error message if sync fails so that I know what went wrong and can try again.
acceptanceCriteria: If sync fails, show an error message with the failure reason
Offer a 'Retry' button to attempt sync again
User must retry until sync succeeds (no skip option)
API key remains saved even if sync fails
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Show sync progress indicator on Home screen during pull-to-refresh
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see when the app is syncing data on the Home screen so that I know my data is being updated.
acceptanceCriteria: When a sync is in progress from pull-to-refresh, show a 'Syncing...' indicator
Indicator is informative only (no cancel option needed)
Indicator disappears when sync completes (success or failure)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
